name: Baoshan Iron & Steel Co., Ltd.
summary: Baoshan Iron & Steel Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of iron and steel products in China and internationally. It operates through Iron and Steel Manufacturing, Processing and Distribution, and Others segments. The company offers hot-rolled steel; pickled HR steel sheet; cold rolled steel sheet, such as oncoated steel steel, galvanzied steel sheet, tin plate and TFS, precoated steel sheet, electrical steel, etc.; prepaimted stainless steel; galvanized steel sheet; electrical steel sheet; heavy plates; pipes and tubes; bar and wire rods; stainless steel; and special steel, which includes bar, wire, plate and sheet, strip, seamless tube, forging, etc. It also engages in the provision of asset management and information technology services, as well as transportation, warehousing, and postal services; steel trading; smelting and rolling black metal; and manufacturing and selling hot-dip galvanized steel sheets and laser tailor-welded plate products. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Shanghai, China. Baoshan Iron & Steel Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of China Baowu Steel Group Co., Ltd.
